children.heading: Requirement to maintain records
children.label: a Requirement to maintain records
children.text: The President shall maintain detailed records on the use of any aircraft made available to a foreign country under this part, including aircraft made available before .October 27, 1986

children.heading: Congressional access to records
children.label: b Congressional access to records
children.text: The President shall make the records maintained pursuant to subsection (a) available to the Congress upon a request of the Chairman of the Committee on Foreign Affairs of the House of Representatives or the Chairman of the Committee on Foreign Relations of the Senate.
